title: Vote for your favorite new features!
excerpt:
Did you know that you can shape our future roadmap?  Every quarter, our dedicated product and development teams sit down to discuss the most popular community feature requests — the ones YOU vote for! 
Ready to leave you…

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Did you know that you can shape our future roadmap? Every quarter, our dedicated product and development teams sit down to discuss the most popular community feature requests — the ones YOU vote for!

Ready to leave your mark on our roadmap? Here’s how to jump in:

Head over to the Feature Request Category on our community forum.

Take a moment to Sign In or Create an Account if you haven’t already.

Cast Your Votes on the features that excite you the most and you’d love to see implemented next!

Every vote brings your favorite feature one step closer to reality! Let’s innovate together! Check it out!
